features.featureTitle: Rebuild the entire frontend as the Bunsik Korean Restaurant website. Replace all existing Luna's Kitchen branding, content, colors, fonts, and components. Apply a Korean street food inspired theme with a warm red (#C0392B tones), black, and cream color palette, modern clean layout, and mobile-first responsive design. Use legible sans-serif fonts suitable for a casual-premium restaurant. Update index.html meta title, description, and keywords for Bunsik Korean Restaurant in Griffith NSW.

Create a full-screen Hero section with: headline 'Authentic Korean Street Food in Griffith', subheadline 'Fresh • Flavorful • Made with Love', and three CTA buttons: 'View Menu' (smooth scrolls to menu section), 'Order Online' (scrolls to ordering section), and 'Book a Table' (scrolls to reservation section). The background must show generated images of Korean fried chicken and tteokbokki with a dark overlay for text legibility.

Create an About Us section with: the restaurant story text ('Bunsik Korean Restaurant brings the taste of authentic Korean street food and traditional meals to Griffith. From crispy Korean fried chicken to sizzling bulgogi and comforting stews, we serve bold flavors in a casual, family-friendly atmosphere.'), location address ('Shop 1/2 Yambil St, Griffith NSW 2680 – Located in Griffin Plaza'), and phone number (+61 2 6964 7310).

Create an Opening Hours section displaying the full weekly schedule: Sunday 11am–8pm; Monday–Thursday 11am–3pm, 5pm–9pm; Friday 11am–3pm, 5pm–9pm; Saturday 11am–9pm. Highlight the current day visually.

Create a Menu section with four tabbed or visually separated categories. Each category lists all items with name and price exactly as specified: Korean Street Food (Rose Tteokbokki $12.50, Tteokbokki $11.00, Kimchi Pancake $28.60, Seafood Pancake $31.20, Gimbap $12.35, Fried Dumplings (5pcs) $16.50); Korean Fried Chicken (Original $18.50, Sweet Soy $19.50, Hot & Spicy $19.50, Snow Cheese $19.50, Sweet & Spicy $19.50); Signature Meals (Bibimbap $27.30, Sizzling Beef Bulgogi $29.90, Kimchi Stew $29.90, Galbi-Tang $33.90, Cheese Spicy Chicken $33.90, Chicken Katsu $29.90); CUPBAP Bowls (Hot & Spicy Chicken CUPBAP $17.55, Sweet Soy Chicken CUPBAP $17.55, Beef Bulgogi CUPBAP $18.20, Spicy Pork CUPBAP $18.20).

Create an Online Ordering section with two prominent buttons: 'Order Pickup' and 'Order Delivery'. Include descriptive text inviting customers to order online. The buttons should be styled prominently and link to placeholder order URLs (e.g., '#order-pickup' and '#order-delivery') that can be updated later.

Create a Table Reservation section with an online booking form collecting: Name (text input), Phone (tel input), Date (date picker), Time (time picker), and Number of Guests (number input). On form submission, store the reservation in the backend and show a success confirmation message to the user.

Create a Reviews section displaying a 4.7-star rating prominently (e.g., '4.7 ★ out of 5'), and a carousel or scrollable list of at least three customer testimonials. Testimonials should reflect authentic Korean restaurant dining experiences.

Create a Location & Contact section displaying: address (Shop 1/2 Yambil St, Griffith NSW 2680), phone (+61 2 6964 7310), an embedded Google Map iframe for the Griffin Plaza location, and info badges for: Free Parking Lot, Wheelchair Accessible, and Accepts Credit/Debit/NFC Payments.

Create a site-wide Header/Navigation with the Bunsik logo/name, smooth-scroll links to all main sections (Menu, Order, Reservations, About, Contact), and a mobile hamburger menu. Create a Footer with business name, address, phone, opening hours summary, and copyright.
